languages.text: {n}Себериан молчит. Долго, очень долго, явно размышляя. Когда он начинает говорить, его голос звучит тише и глубже чем обычно.{/n} "Если наш поход обернется неудачей... если риск, что династия останется без Патента, будет слишком велик... тебе придется заключить эту сделку. Не ради себя. Ради рода. Ради тех, кто получит Патент — и титул Вольного Торговца — после тебя".

{n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉默良久，显然在深思。他再开口时，声音比平时更安静，也更深沉。{/n}“若我们的远征失败，若王朝失去贸易授状的风险过高，你就必须做这笔交易。不是为你自己，而是为了王朝，为了那些在你之后继承贸易授状与行商浪人头衔的人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉默良久，显然在深思。他再开口时，声音比平时更安静，也更深沉。{/n}“若我们的远征失败，若王朝失去贸易授状的风险过高，你就必须做这笔交易。不是为你自己，而是为了王朝，为了那些在你之后继承贸易授状与行商浪人头衔的人。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian, meditabundo, guarda un largo silencio. Cuando lo rompe, su voz es más queda y grave de lo habitual.{/n} «Si nuestra expedición termina fracasando, si el riesgo de que la dinastía pierda la Patente se vuelve demasiado elevado, tendrá que tomar esa decisión. No por su bien, sino por el de la dinastía. Por quienes heredarán la Patente y el cargo de Comerciante Independiente después».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, meditabundo, guarda un largo silencio. Cuando lo rompe, su voz es más queda y grave de lo habitual.{/n} «Si nuestra expedición termina fracasando, si el riesgo de que la dinastía pierda la Patente se vuelve demasiado elevado, tendrá que tomar esa decisión. No por su bien, sino por el de la dinastía. Por quienes heredarán la Patente y el cargo de Comerciante Independiente después».

languages.text: {n}Seberian garde le silence un long moment, plongé dans ses pensées. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, le calme et la profondeur de sa voix vous surprennent.{/n} « Si notre expédition échoue, si le risque de voir la dynastie sans lettre de marque devient trop grand, vous devrez vous plier à ses demandes. Non pas pour vous-même, mais pour la dynastie tout entière. Pour celles et ceux qui hériteront de la lettre et du titre de libre-marchand après vous. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian garde le silence un long moment, plongé dans ses pensées. Lorsqu'il reprend la parole, le calme et la profondeur de sa voix vous surprennent.{/n} « Si notre expédition échoue, si le risque de voir la dynastie sans lettre de marque devient trop grand, vous devrez vous plier à ses demandes. Non pas pour vous-même, mais pour la dynastie tout entière. Pour celles et ceux qui hériteront de la lettre et du titre de libre-marchand après vous. »

languages.text: {n}Derin düşüncelere dalan Seberian, uzun bir süre sessiz kalıyor. Konuştuğundaysa sesi, her zamankinden daha suskun ve derinden geliyor.{/n} "Çabamız başarısızlıkla sonuçlanırsa, hanedanlığın Ruhsatname'den yoksun kalma riski büyürse bu anlaşmayı yapmak zorunda kalacaksın. Kendi iyiliğin için değil. Hanedanlığın iyiliği için. Senden sonra Ruhsatname'yi ve Hür Tacir ünvanını miras alacak olanlar için."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

Kendi iyiliğin için değil. Hanedanlığın iyiliği için. Senden sonra Ruhsatname'yi ve Hür Tacir ünvanını miras alacak olanlar için."

languages.text: {n}Seberian schweigt lange Zeit und scheint in Gedanken versunken zu sein. Als er spricht, klingt seine Stimme leiser und tiefer als sonst.{/n} "Sollte unsere Expedition scheitern und die Gefahr zu groß sein, dass der Handelsbrief nicht in die Hände der Dynastie zurückkehrt, müsst Ihr diesen Handel eingehen. Nicht um Euretwillen. Um der Dynastie willen. Für jene, die den Handelsbrief und den Titel des Freihändlers von Euch erben werden."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. When he speaks, his voice sounds quieter and deeper than usual.{/n} "If our expedition ends in failure, if the risk of the dynasty being left without the Warrant becomes too great, you will have to make that bargain. Not for your own sake. For the dynasty's sake. For those who will inherit the Warrant and the title of Rogue Trader after you."

Als er spricht, klingt seine Stimme leiser und tiefer als sonst.{/n} "Sollte unsere Expedition scheitern und die Gefahr zu groß sein, dass der Handelsbrief nicht in die Hände der Dynastie zurückkehrt, müsst Ihr diesen Handel eingehen. Nicht um Euretwillen. Um der Dynastie willen. Für jene, die den Handelsbrief und den Titel des Freihändlers von Euch erben werden."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは長い沈黙の後、深く考え込んでいる様子で言った。{/n}「もし我々の探検隊が失敗に終わるならば、もし王室が免状を失う危険が大きくなれば、君はそれを売却せねばならぬ。君のためではなく、王室のため、君の後継者が免状と「ならず者」の称号を受け継ぐためだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian is silent for a long time, clearly deep in thought. traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは長い沈黙の後、深く考え込んでいる様子で言った。{/n}「もし我々の探検隊が失敗に終わるならば、もし王室が免状を失う危険が大きくなれば、君はそれを売却せねばならぬ。君のためではなく、王室のため、君の後継者が免状と「ならず者」の称号を受け継ぐためだ。」
